submission_text: Assignment copy below is typed natively. Task 1: fix the JOIN predicate in the report query. Candidate note: use ON o.user_id = u.id and remove the accidental cross join. Task 2 answer is shown in the attached screenshot fragment. Scanned addendum. Photo fragment. Task 2 answer: use a partial index on active rows only. That keeps the index smaller and speeds up the filtered query.

task_solutions.answer: Use ON o.user_id = u.id and remove the accidental cross join.
Use a partial index on active rows only.
